_comment: Community-established FT4/FT8 calling frequencies for amateur satellites.
_comment2: These are NOT in the SATNOGS database. Source: JH1NHK @JH1NHK (https://x.com/JH1NHK/status/1882598594924212321)
_comment3: Format: Rx=downlink, Tx=uplink. Frequencies may change as community conventions evolve. Last reviewed: 2026-06-01.

description: FT4 Calling — community standard (V/U inverting transponder)
notes: Community FT4 calling frequency within the V/U inverting transponder passband. Rx 435.612 / Tx 145.993. Not in SATNOGS. Ref: JH1NHK https://x.com/JH1NHK/status/1882598594924212321
Community FT4 calling frequency within the U/V transponder passband. Rx 145.857 / Tx 435.118. Not in SATNOGS. Ref: JH1NHK https://x.com/JH1NHK/status/1882598594924212321
Community FT4 calling frequency. Rx 435.812 / Tx 145.938. Not in SATNOGS. Ref: JH1NHK https://x.com/JH1NHK/status/1882598594924212321
